Headline: #95 95th Temporary Westbound Reroute near 95th/Normal
ShortDescription: Westbound 95 95th buses are temporarily rerouted via 95th, Normal, 93rd, Parnell and 95th: due to, street blockage near 95th/Normal.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
How will this affect my trip?

 

Westbound #95 95th buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions via 95th, Normal, 93rd, Parnell, 95th and over regular route: due to, street blockage near 95th/Normal.

Eastbound buses are not affected.

Allow extra travel time.
